3.Android permissionsSome of our Android mobileapplications and games (collectively called “Products”) may require permissionslike :ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION,ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE, ACCESS_WIFI_STATE, CAMERA,INTERNET, READ_CONTACTS, READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, READ_PHONE_STATE, RECORD_AUDIO,SEND_SMS, SET_WALLPAPER, SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW, VIBRATE, WAKE_LOCK,WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE (collectively called the “Permissions”)All Permissions are used in

Products to provide best user experience. All personal and non-personalinformation obtained by the use of above Permissions are used only by theProducts itself and are not stored, used, disclosed outside of the Products.

4.Changes to our Privacy PolicyThis Privacy Policy may be updated fromtime to time for any reason. We will notify you of any changes to our PrivacyPolicy by posting the new Privacy Policy on https://just4funutilities.s3.eu-north-1.amazonaws.com/Privacy.htm.Your continued use of the Just4Fun Utilities Services following theposting of changes will mean you accept those changes.
